历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13818 → 14371 → 22281 → 19126 → 18370. A significant backward shift occurred in 2023 (22281), rebounding to 19126 in 2024 and further to 18370 in 2025, showing a continuous recovery trend in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 18370. The planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 26, 27, 27, 27, and 27 respectively. The 2026 plan remains at 27, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, indicating a stable competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 58th, with a stable ranking in the 50–60 range in recent years, considered upper-middle level. The reputation evaluation for 2025–2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (such as a vice dean's extramarital affair), which may moderately suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 69th, rated as average, with moderately low short video exposure. It has 5 A- or above disciplines: Education A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, and Geography A. Its strength in teacher-training disciplines is prominent, but the Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Chemistry, Biology, etc.) are not highly correlated with these advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics-related majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication remain socially popular. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province general college entrance examination is approximately 200,000, a slight increase from the 143,000 Physics Category candidates in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a developed region in the Yangtze River Delta, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Liaoning candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Liaoning is relatively stable, with no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 18370, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the potential slight suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation incidents, and the slight increase in the number of local candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from 18370. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18400, with a range of 17900–18900.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Jiangsu)
- Computer Science and Technology (Jiangsu)
- Biological Sciences (Jiangsu) (Biological Science (Teacher Training, National Science Base Class), Biotechnology, Ecology)
- Chemistry (Jiangsu) (Teacher Training, Non-Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Intelligent Equipment and Systems (Jiangsu)
- Energy and Power (Jiangsu) (Energy and Power Engineering, Energy and Environmental Systems Engineering, Energy Service Engineering)
- Synthetic Biology (Jiangsu).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Food Science and Engineering (Jiangsu)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Jiangsu) (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science)
- Marine Resources and Environment (Jiangsu).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 17900–18900, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 17900), prioritize competitive majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. For rankings near the upper bound (around 18900), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1454 → 1413 → 1785 → 2325 → 2246, showing an overall backward trend. It stabilized around 1400 in 2021–2022, then significantly shifted to above 1700 from 2023, reaching 2325 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 2246 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 800 positions over the past 3 years. The planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 18, 17, 16, 16, and 16 respectively, showing a gradual annual reduction. In 2026, the plan sharply decreases to 13, a reduction of 3 from 2025 (a decrease of about 18.8%), significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 58th, with recent rankings stable in the 50–60 range, belonging to the upper-middle level. The reputation evaluation for 2025–2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (such as a vice dean's extramarital affair causing public opinion), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 69, rated as average, with medium-low short video exposure. It has 5 A- or above disciplines: Education A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, and Geography A. Among the History Category enrollment majors, Chinese Language and Literature corresponds to Chinese Language and Literature A-, Ideological and Political Education corresponds to Marxist Theory A, and Foreign Languages and Literatures corresponds to Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, with a high match between advantageous disciplines and enrollment majors, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher/education majors is divided and wait-and-see, while Chinese language/Chinese literature majors are recommended as hot. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, a significant increase from 56,000 in the History Category in 2025, intensifying competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts candidates in Liaoning. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning has been continuously shrinking in recent years, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2246, the significant reduction of about 18.8% in the 2026 History Category enrollment plan (intensified competition, ranking moving forward), negative reputation incidents that may slightly suppress application enthusiasm (ranking moving backward), and a notable increase in the total number of local candidates (intensified competition, ranking moving forward), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly move forward from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1973, with a range of 1473–2473.

For rankings near the upper limit (around 2473), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety, noting the significant reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026, which intensifies competition.
